messages.content: I want to teach my son who is just 7 years old about convolutional neural network(CNN). Can you give me some suggestion?

There are many wonderful resources available for teaching children about CNNs, such as the free online course "Introduction to Computational Neuroscience and Deep Learning" from Harvard University and the Massachusetts Institute of Technology. You could also try using videos and interactive tutorials, such as those from Udacity and Coursera, to help your son understand the concepts. Additionally, you could also explore interactive websites such as The Neural Network Tutorial, which explains concepts with fun and interactive examples.
Sorry, I type it wrong. I want to teach my students in college about the knowledge. Can you help me write the introduction?

The field of knowledge is vast and ever-expanding, with new discoveries and insights being made every day. Artificial neural networks, and convolutional neural networks in particular, have allowed us to make new connections and understandings of the world around us. In this course, we will explore the fundamentals of CNNs, and how they can be used to solve complex problems. We will also investigate how recent advances in the field of deep learning are making a profound impact on science, technology and society. By the end of this course, students will have a firm understanding of the fundamentals of CNNs and their applications, and will be able to apply this knowledge to solve real-world problems.
